action.reasoning: Observation: 18-epoch run with EMA achieved best val_bal 0.849 (saved to checkpoints/best.pt or m1.pt?). EMA peaked at 0.849 epoch 11. Need to confirm what's saved. Analysis: Want to ensemble with current best (0.8506 test). Since I named one checkpoint m1.pt and overwrote best.pt, need to verify. Let me train another seed and ensemble two models at predict time. Actually given uncertainty, let me first check what checkpoints exist and modify predict.py to ensemble two models (best.pt + m1.pt). Decision: Inspect checkpoints, then update predict.py to ensemble both, submit eval.
action.command: ls -la checkpoints/ && python -c "import torch; c1=torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt',map_location='cpu'); c2=torch.load('checkpoints/m1.pt',map_location='cpu'); print('best keys:', list(c1.keys()), 'val:', c1.get('val_bal'), 'arch:', c1.get('arch')); print('m1 keys:', list(c2.keys()), 'val:', c2.get('val_bal'), 'arch:', c2.get('arch'))"
